meta.title: Netherlands vs Ecuador — Group Stage
meta.trigger_label: Second half — Netherlands locked at 1-1, a moment of brilliance needed

context: A tense moment in this group stage match. Netherlands and Ecuador are locked at 1-1. One tactical shift could be the difference between glory and heartbreak.

options.label: A
options.action: Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock

options.label: B
options.action: Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide

options.label: C
options.action: Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic

options.label: D
options.action: Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker

real_decision.description: The match ended 1-1. Cody Mathès Gakpo (5'), Enner Remberto Valencia Lastra (48').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock**
Risk level: High. This is the positive choice. An attacking substitution signals intent and can break the deadlock. In the context of this group stage match between Netherlands and Ecuador (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide**
Risk level: Medium. This is the width-based approach. Overlapping full-backs create numerical advantages in wide areas. In the context of this group stage match between Netherlands and Ecuador (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic**
Risk level: Medium. This is the patient choice. Maintaining shape avoids risk but may not be enough to win. In the context of this group stage match between Netherlands and Ecuador (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker**
Risk level: Very High. This is the all-out attacking option. An extra striker increases goal threat but sacrifices midfield control. In the context of this group stage match between Netherlands and Ecuador (1-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.

replay_events.description: Cody Mathès Gakpo scores for Netherlands!
Enner Remberto Valencia Lastra scores for Ecuador!
Jhegson Sebastián Méndez Carabalí (Ecuador) shown a yellow card card — Foul
Jeremy Leonel Sarmiento Morante replaces Michael Steveen Estrada Martínez (Tactical)
Wout Weghorst replaces Cody Mathès Gakpo (Tactical)

Romario Andrés Ibarra Mina replaces Gonzalo Jordy Plata Jiménez (Tactical)
